violations.description: Suite enforces serial mode, signaling shared-state coupling and reduced isolation.
violations.suggestion: Refactor data setup so cases can execute in parallel safely.

violations.description: Static thread IDs are reused across all tests, increasing collision risk across retries/workers.
violations.suggestion: Namespace thread IDs per test run or seed isolated records per test case.

violations.description: Inbound payload fixture targets shared thread context without explicit teardown.
violations.suggestion: Add per-test cleanup/seed reset helper to keep fixture state fully isolated.

recommendations: Eliminate serial-only requirement by isolating thread data per test.
Add teardown/reset utility for ux-r3 fixtures to reduce cross-test coupling.
Run ux-r3 API tests under parallel mode in CI once isolation refactor is complete.
summary: Isolation is acceptable but constrained by serial execution and shared seeded identifiers.
